india_trends.title: India among the most important growth markets for branded residences for Marriott
india_trends.summary: Marriott International is experiencing robust demand for branded residences in India. A major Westin Residences project in Gurugram, developed by Whiteland Corporation, is underway. This development features numerous premium residences and is attracting significant investment. The project aims to se

india_trends.title: The K-pop cash flow: South Korean beats power India's FDI remix
india_trends.summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung's visit to New Delhi signals India's strategic push for large-scale FDI in advanced manufacturing and technology. Discussions focused on deepening capital flows, particularly in semiconductors, shipbuilding, and energy, aiming to position India as a preferred inv

india_trends.title: Vedanta demerger record date falls on a stock market holiday — When should you buy to be eligible for spin-off benefit?
india_trends.summary: Vedanta will demerge its businesses into aluminium, merchant power, oil and gas and iron ore verticals into separate listed entities. As part of the spin-off, each shareholder will be allotted shares in the ratio of 1:1 for each demerged entity.

india_trends.title: Premier Explosives shares jump 10% on ₹350 crore export order win; up 43% in April
india_trends.summary: Premier Explosives stock surged 10% to ₹545 on April 22 after securing export orders worth ₹350.23 crore for defense products. Despite a weak December quarter performance, the company's strong order book remains promising for future growth.

india_trends.title: Expert view: Defence story structurally strong; approach IT as company-specific bets, says Alpha AMC CEO
india_trends.summary: As the IT sector undergoes transformation driven by AI, Alpha AMC CEO Rajesh Singla emphasises the need to adopt a company-specific approach. The defence sector shows robust potential due to government spending and indigenisation.

india_trends.title: Nestlé India delivers multi-quarter high, but FY27 cool-down looms amid pricey valuations
india_trends.summary: Nestlé India reported 22.6% revenue growth, driven by distribution expansion, successful omni-channel strategies, and increased advertising. Despite a declining gross margin, Ebitda margin rose to 26.3%. The question is whether this growth can be sustained amid rising costs and competition.

india_trends.title: Nifty 50 Falls 0.63%, Sensex Drops 671 Points as IT Stocks Drag; Volatility Jumps 6.9% - Dalal Street Investment Journal
india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 Falls 0.63%, Sensex Drops 671 Points as IT Stocks Drag; Volatility Jumps 6.9%    Dalal Street Investment Journal

india_trends.title: US-Iran war: Is the ‘safe haven’ narrative for gold and silver breaking down?
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices have remained highly volatile, especially after begging of the US-Iran war. However, analysts believe both assets have a scope to offer higher returns if the Middle East crisis begins to weigh on global growth or trigger broader risk aversion.

india_trends.title: IHCL completes acquisition of 51 pc stake in Brij Hospitality for Rs 222 cr
india_trends.summary: Indian Hotels Company (IHCL), a Tata Group firm, has finalized its acquisition of a 51% stake in Brij Hospitality for approximately Rs 222 crore. This strategic investment, made through IHCL and its step-down subsidiaries, now makes Brij Hospitality a subsidiary of IHCL. The deal involved purchasing

india_trends.title: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results 2026: Net profit rises 19% to ₹1,356 crore; ₹36 per share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Tech Mahindra's Q4FY26 profit rose 19% YoY to ₹1,356 crore, up from ₹1,142 crore last year. Revenue grew 12.6% YoY to ₹15,076 crore. A final dividend of ₹36 per share is recommended, totaling ₹51 including the interim dividend, pending AGM approval.

india_trends.title: Sunkonnect plans to cut 15% carbon dioxide emissions in educational institutes over 4 years
india_trends.summary: Sunkonnect's ambitious plan targets 34 million tonnes of CO2 reduction. The firm will install solar rooftops on over 5,000 schools. Energy audits, LED upgrades and waste management are also included. This initiative aims for energy-efficient and net-zero campuses across India.

india_trends.title: PNC Infratech share price jumps 14% after receipt of two highway projects
india_trends.summary: PNC Infratech share price gained 20% in one month, but fell 11% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis. The smallcap stock has declined 20% in one year, and has dropped 48% over the past two years.

india_trends.title: HCL Tech flags weak Q4, bets big on AI to drive next phase of growth
india_trends.summary: HCL Technologies faced a slower fourth quarter than anticipated. Weakness in its software business and certain service areas impacted results. However, the company sees significant future growth from Artificial Intelligence. New AI services are already generating substantial revenue. HCL Technologie

india_trends.title: Stick to defensive and quality themes amid volatile global setup: Mayuresh Joshi
india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets are showing a strong rebound. Investors are now carefully selecting companies with good earnings and strong finances. Key sectors like power and pharmaceuticals are attracting attention. Mid-cap PSU banks are also seen as promising. Niche engineering and manufacturing firms are

india_trends.title: Mehul Telecom IPO allotment to be finalised today. Latest GMP, step-by-step guide to check status
india_trends.summary: Mehul Telecom IPO allotment will be finalized today, April 22. Investors can check their allotment status on Kfin Technologies Ltd's portal. The IPO subscription was 44.91 times, and refunds for non-allocation start April 23, with shares credited the same day. Mehul Telecom IPO GMP is +3.

india_trends.title: Tech Mahindra declares Rs 36/share final dividend; sets July 3 as record date
india_trends.summary: Tech Mahindra Dividend announcement: The company has set July 3 as the record date to determine shareholders' eligibility to receive the dividend.

india_trends.title: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: Cons profit rises 16% YoY to Rs 1,354 crore; revenue up 13%
india_trends.summary: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: The company’s board has also approved a final dividend of Rs 36 per share for the financial year ended March 2026.

india_trends.title: India likely to breach budgeted fiscal deficit target for FY27: BMI
india_trends.summary: India's fiscal deficit may exceed its target, reaching 4.5 percent of GDP. This is due to government policies responding to the West Asia conflict. Measures include supporting key industries and firms. The government might restrict exports of crucial inputs like helium and sulphur. Energy and fertil

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock under ₹100 hits 10% upper circuit after Vijay Kedia buys 1% stake in Q4
india_trends.summary: Websol Energy shares surged 10% following Vijay Kedia's acquisition of a 1.02% stake. Despite recent gains, the stock has fallen over 35% in a year. The company will hold a board meeting on April 27 to discuss Q4 results and a potential dividend, its first in 17 years.

india_trends.title: Ruchit Jain of Motilal Oswal suggests Balrampur Chini, Paras Defence, DMart shares to buy in the near-term
india_trends.summary: Indian benchmark indices faced selling pressure on April 22, with the Sensex dropping over 800 points and Nifty 50 falling more than 200 points. Despite this, the broader market showed strength. Analysts recommend buying Balrampur Chini, Paras Defence, and DMart for potential short-term gains.
